zh.Alvanley, Runcorn, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利
zh.Aldford Castle, Aldford, Cheshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter de Arderne於1241年出生在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德時，他的父親Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester26歲，母親Agnes de Orreby21歲。他於大約1271年與Margery Elleforde在英國英格蘭爾阿爾德福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年9月在英國英格蘭爾阿爾萬利享年51歲。

zh-hans.Alvanley, Runcorn, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利
zh-hans.Aldford Castle, Aldford, Cheshire, Engla: 英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter de Arderne于1241年出生在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德时，他的父亲Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester26岁，母亲Agnes de Orreby21岁。他于大约1271年与Margery Elleforde在英国英格兰爾阿爾德福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年9月在英国英格兰爾阿爾萬利享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Arderne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ardern
meanings: English: locative name variant of Arden . Arden in Cheshire is recorded as Arderne in 1260, and Arden in Warwicks is recorded as Arderne in 1200.

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter de Arderne was born in 1241, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, was 26 and his mother, Agnes de Orreby, was 21. He married Margery Elleforde about 1271, in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in September 1292, in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter de Arderne est né en 1241, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Orreby, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margery Elleforde environ 1271, à Aldford, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1292, à Alvanley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter de Arderne 1241 in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester 26 und seine Mutter Agnes de Orreby 21. Er hat um 1271 in Aldford, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Margery Elleforde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb im September 1292 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Alvanley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arderne è nato il nel 1241 nel Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Orreby, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margery Elleforde circa 1271, nel Aldford, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1292, nel Alvanley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter de Arderneが1241年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードで生まれた時，父Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chesterは26歳，母Agnes de Orrebyは21歳であった。約1271年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルドフォードでMargery Ellefordeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年9月にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアアルヴァンリーで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter de Arderne(이)가 1241년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Orreby(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1271년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 알드퍼드에서 Margery Elleforde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 9월 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 앨반리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter de Arderne nasceu em 1241, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Orreby, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Elleforde aproximadamente 1271, em Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1292, em Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter de Arderne родился в 1241 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Orreby, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Elleforde около 1271 г. в местности алдфорд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1292 г. в местности алванли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год.

sm.from 1292 to 1300: mai le 1292 e o'o I le 1300

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter de Arderne nació en 1241, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Walkelin d'Arderne Chief Justice of Chester, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Agnes de Orreby, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Margery Elleforde aproximadamente 1271, en Aldford, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1292, en Alvanley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años.
